---
title: "Spatial IV Benchmark"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("30-spatial-2sls-model-attempts.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 30: spatial-2SLS attempts")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The legacy comments said these attempts did not work even with diagnostics disabled. The current tables therefore distinguish between `ivreg()` returning an object and diagnostics/coefficient summaries being numerically meaningful. These outputs remain exploratory and are not promoted to the final paper.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r status, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
spatial_iv_status <- read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_model_status.csv")
status_table <- spatial_iv_status[setdiff(names(spatial_iv_status), "formula")]
analysis_table(status_table, "Spatial-IV model status")
```

```{r formulas, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (all(c("model", "formula") %in% names(spatial_iv_status))) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(spatial_iv_status))) {
    if (nzchar(spatial_iv_status$formula[[i]])) {
      cat("### Formula: `", spatial_iv_status$model[[i]], "`\n\n", sep = "")
      cat("```text\n", spatial_iv_status$formula[[i]], "\n```\n\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r diagnostics, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_diagnostics_summary.csv"), "IV diagnostic summaries")
```

```{r coeffs, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_coefficient_summary.csv"), "Default coefficient summaries")
```

```{r clustered, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_clustered_coefficient_summary.csv"), "Clustered-SE coeftest attempt")
```
